title: Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget before the Year 2025 in the Amount of Forty-Two Million Hundred Forty-Five Thousand Five Hundred Thirty-Two Pesos and 18/100 (Php 42,145,525.18) Chargeable Against Provincial Fund Assistance for LGU's Participation to Anilag Festival 2025, Government Equity Surplus, and PS Savings and Reversion of Funds amounting to: (1) Two Million (Php 2,000,000.00) Under the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund (5% MDRRMF) - Current Appropriation
